title: cylindropuntia thurberi
intro: Cylindropuntia thurberi, also known as the teddy bear cholla, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia thurberi include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties against certain pathogens. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as salves and ointments, are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
